message:
feat(fnp-python): native Rust all/any implementations + conformance harnesses

Ports np.all and np.any from Python passthrough to native Rust
UFuncArray::all and UFuncArray::any. Both support:
- axis (None or single integer)
Falls back to NumPy for out, keepdims, or where params.

Adds 200+ conformance test cases across 10 tests covering flat reduction,
2D/3D axis, integer/float dtypes, and empty array handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
